Title: Authentication
User Story / Description: As a user, I want to authenticate into the application so I can securely access my account.
Context: The application currently does not require authentication.
Acceptance Criteria: User can login|User can logout|JWT token is returned

Title: Login Screen
Acceptance Criteria: Email field is displayed|Password field is displayed|Login button is enabled

Title: Login API
Context: Backend endpoint responsible for validating credentials.
Acceptance Criteria: Returns JWT|Returns 401 for invalid credentials|Logs authentication attempts

Title: Forgot Password
User Story / Description: Allow users to reset their password.
Acceptance Criteria: Recovery email is sent|Reset link expires after 24h

Title: Dashboard
User Story / Description: As a user, I want to visualize my dashboard.
Context: Users need a centralized view of their information.
Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard loads successfully|Widgets are displayed|Responsive layout

Title: Notifications
User Story / Description: As a user, I want to receive notifications.
Acceptance Criteria: Notifications can be created|Notifications can be dismissed
